description: Powernall Personall Plugin Hooks — custom hooks for personal workflows, knowledge management, and development processes.

hooks.command: echo 'KB checkpoint: before compacting, invoke the kb skill to save any key insights, decisions, or non-obvious patterns discovered in this session.'

bash -c 'if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); unstaged=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$staged" ] && [ -n "$unstaged" ]; then echo "⚠️  You have both staged and unstaged changes. Consider staging everything or committing before continuing."; fi; fi'
